title: cyperus longus var. stenostachyus
intro: Cyperus longus var. stenostachyus, also known as umbrella papyrus or umbrella sedge, is a perennial aquatic plant belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Cyperus longus var. stenostachyus include its ability to aid in the treatment of urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the roots and rhizomes of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions that are often used to relieve symptoms of these conditions.
